name: 12-dichloroethane_conformational_analysis
prompt: Run the conformational-analysis task on 12-dichloroethane using the GFN2-xTB method in the gas phase. Pass only --method xtb and the .xyz file — the task auto-detects all rotatable bonds by default, so do NOT add any extra flag for that (there is no --auto/--rotors flag). Report the rotation barrier(s) found (per scanned dihedral) and state the method used. Use the chemkit tools; do not guess the number.
